properties.description:
Legible is an AI consulting practice that helps Claude customers close the gap between individual usage and team-level returns. 

Buying the licenses is the easy part. The hard part is changing the operating model: deciding which workflows to prioritize, getting leaders fluent enough to make those calls, and doing the unglamorous work of enabling the team.
We work across four interconnected offerings:

Executive fluency: train leadership in what's possible, where the risks lie, and how to get org-wide leverage.

Strategy: identify where Claude creates the most leverage and align leaders on the workflows worth changing first.

Enablement: working sessions for executives, operators, EAs, and functional teams, built around the actual work they do.

Execution: we roll up our sleeves and build the agents, automations, and operating playbooks ourselves.

We've advised 150+ C-suites across ten industries on their AI posture. The teams getting real returns treat AI as an operating model change, not a tool rollout.
If your Claude rollout feels stuck in pockets of experimentation, let's compare notes.

leads.linkedinDescription: I'm a technology, partnerships, and product leader with 15+ years building at the intersection of travel and innovation, turning emerging technology distribution, AI, connectivity into commercial outcomes. As Country Director for Colombia/Latam at SiteMinder the open hotel commerce platform connecting independent and boutique hotels to OTAs, GDS, and direct channels, later ASX-listed. I then ran LATAM and AWS partnerships for NLX, a no-code conversational AI platform later acquired by AWS and folded into Amazon Connect. The through-line: travel platforms, AI, and the partnerships that scale them. I believe the next decade brings a new B2B platform layer beneath independent and boutique luxury supply advisor-enabled, API-native, AI-operated. Most of the industry builds it from the consumer side; I'm building it from the supply side. As product and engineering leader at UJV, a Miami-based B2B luxury travel platform, I oversee product, engineering, API distribution, connectivity, and AI. UJV doesn't sell to consumers we power 4,000+ advisors and agencies, connecting independent and boutique luxury hotels and ground services worldwide to the modern advisor economy. Since January I've been architecting an AI-native organization, central to which is a "company brain": a structured context layer that renders internal data readable for AI, delivering high-fidelity outputs while empowering developers to operate as elite engineers. A large share of high-end, complex leisure multi-destination trips, groups, family travel isn't self-serve. Independent hotels and high-end ground services don't have a marketing problem; they have a platform problem. They need workflow, advisor demand, AI leverage, and connectivity built for how this travel transacts. Whoever builds that layer well owns the category as the next generation of advisors moves off legacy networks. Based in Miami: a father, a lifelong builder and learner, and a past advisory board member at Cornell's Center for Hospitality Research and its AI roundtable. properties.tagline: Vision Driven Performance
properties.description:
Focal Systems’ platform helps retailers cut shelf scanning cost in half by switching from manual to automated shelf scans.

The solution is based on low cost, discrete shelf cameras, a sophisticated computer vision model and a cloud-based machine learning platform that is tuned for complex retail environments.

By providing automated, real-time insight into on-shelf product availability, retailers can repurpose store personnel to focus on customer experience and other higher value tasks. 

In addition, the real time data captured by the shelf cameras feeds into Focal Systems’ AI engine which can help automate and optimize product availability and merchandising decisions.

These optimizations have proven to save up to 50% on manual shelf scanning cost and significantly improve in-store customer experience via higher product availability which generates a 3-5% increase in sales compared to baseline stores.

Focal Systems’ platform is deployable at scale and will provide impactful results from day one. It also integrates with existing retail systems and applications to enable additional cost savings and insights from its real-time product availability and analysis.

Focal Systems’ shelf cams are deployed at scale with proven results at several major global retailers and every day process more than 10M shelf scan images.

properties.description:
Neura Health is a virtual neurology clinic for the 145 million Americans with neurological conditions; we have built the first national network of tele-neurologists. Our technology platform leverages smart triage, AI, and self-serve content to make diagnosis and treatment more efficient, while providing a proactive, patient-first solution that delivers empathetic, best-in-class neurological care to those living with disabling and often misunderstood diseases.

With neurology as a top-five expense category for health plans and systems, the opportunity to drive cost savings plus deliver better patient outcomes is enormous. Neura Health treats migraine, headache, tremor, epilepsy, concussion, long-haul COVID, sleep, and patients with undiagnosed symptoms like pain, cognitive fog, numbness, and more.

Neura has raised $10.3m in venture funding from the world's top VC funds including Norwest Venture Partners, Next Play Ventures, Koch Disruptive Technologies, Pear VC, Index, Bessemer, and others.

Staffed by top board-certified neurologists and sub-specialists, Neura Health connects patients with a neurologist video visit within a week, instead of months-long waitlists that local providers typically have. Patients receive a personalized treatment plan, a dedicated health coach, and a concierge team to manage their neurological disease. 

Neura Health’s quality care improves quality of life for people with neurological illness. Our clinical outcomes have been published in two peer-reviewed medical journals in 2022 and 2023.

properties.description:
SimplAI is a full-stack Agentic AI Operating System built for enterprises that need to move beyond isolated LLM experiments and deploy AI that actually runs production workflows.

We enable organizations to build, orchestrate, govern, and scale AI agents across on-prem, private cloud (VPC), hybrid, sovereign, and air-gapped environments—securely and in days, not months.

Despite rapid advances in AI, most enterprises remain blocked by fragmented tooling, limited governance, vendor lock-in, and long deployment cycles. As a result, AI initiatives stay siloed, risky, and difficult to operate at scale.

SimplAI solves this by acting as a unified control and execution layer for agentic systems. Our platform brings together multi-agent orchestration, policy-driven governance, enterprise-grade security, and deep observability—built in by design, not bolted on.

Enterprise-Grade by Design

SimplAI is purpose-built for regulated and mission-critical environments:

• SOC 2 Type II and ISO 27001 aligned
• GDPR, HIPAA, and data-sovereignty ready
• Role-based access control, policy engines, and full audit trails
• Secure on-prem and air-gapped deployments supported
• Designed for scale, reliability, and controlled autonomy

We are production-first and vendor-agnostic, supporting multiple LLMs, open protocols, and flexible infrastructure choices. From BFSI and insurance to government, healthcare, supply chain, and large enterprises, SimplAI helps teams move from experimentation to production-grade AI execution—faster, safer, and with measurable impact.

Agentic AI is becoming infrastructure.
SimplAI is the operating system that runs it.

properties.description:
QuickAlign is a decision-intelligence platform that helps teams, leaders, and consultants reach alignment faster and make decisions that stick.

Built on The Art of Alignment methodology used by hundreds of executive coaches and organizations worldwide, QuickAlign transforms messy, time-consuming group discussions into structured, inclusive, and measurable decision cycles.

The platform guides teams through a simple four-step process—Propose, Probe, Re-Propose, and Close—and integrates real-time feedback using the 5Cs (Clarifying Questions, Compliments, Concerns, Changes, and Commitment Votes). This ensures every voice is heard, ideas are refined collaboratively, and outcomes have genuine buy-in before moving forward.

Powered by AI and analytics, QuickAlign provides leaders with insights into engagement, trust, and alignment patterns across projects, helping organizations identify where decisions stall and where collaboration thrives.

QuickAlign serves as both a facilitation tool for leadership coaches and a decision-intelligence platform for businesses—connecting people, priorities, and processes in one transparent workspace.

Our mission is simple: turn group conversation into commitment and follow-through.
When teams stay aligned, organizations move faster, make better decisions, and deliver results that last.
